thinks.think: A man in a grey pullover with a 'PC' logo stands in a kitchen. He faces the camera with hands clasped. Behind him are white cabinets, a silver kettle, and a blender base. On the counter in front, a white tub and egg carton are visible. The text 'Healthy Brownies' is overlaid at the bottom left.

The man in the grey pullover looks down at the counter, breaking eye contact with the camera. His hands unclasp as he prepares to interact with the items. The overlay text 'Healthy Brownies' persists at the bottom left. The white cabinets and appliances in the background remain stationary.

The man lifts a white tub with green label in his right hand. A small white square bowl is now visible on the left counter. The egg carton is open, displaying brown eggs. He gestures with his left hand near the items. The 'Healthy Brownies' text overlay persists at the bottom left corner.

The man lifts the white tub with the green label higher, presenting it directly toward the camera lens with his right hand. He shifts his gaze from the counter back to look straight at the viewer while holding the container steady. The tub features an image of brownies on the front label. The egg carton remains on the counter.

After a visual dissolve transition, the man now holds a brown egg in each hand over a white square bowl. He looks down at the eggs, preparing to crack them. A silver metal mixing bowl has appeared on the counter behind him to the right. The white tub rests on the table surface.

The man brings his hands together over the small white square bowl. He holds a brown egg with both hands and cracks the shell, preparing to empty the contents into the dish. The large white tub sits on the counter to his right near the egg carton.

The man cracks the brown egg over the white square bowl, pulling the shell halves apart with both hands. The egg contents fall into the dish. He holds the empty shell fragments while looking down at the bowl, which now contains the raw egg. The large white tub remains on the counter to his right.

The man in the grey pullover now holds a second brown egg over the white square bowl, having put down the shell fragments. The bowl contains the yolk and white from the first egg. The large white tub with the green label sits stationary on the counter surface to his right during this action.

The man cracks a second brown egg over the white square bowl, pulling the shell halves apart to release the yolk and white. The bowl now contains two distinct orange yolks sitting in the clear liquid. He holds the empty shell fragments in his hands directly above the bowl.

The man in the grey pullover holds the large white tub with the green label in his right hand, gesturing with his left. He looks directly at the camera. The white bowl with eggs sits on the counter, while the egg carton remains visible to the right.

The man in the grey pullover holds the white tub with the green label. He touches the lid with his left hand while supporting the base with his right. The text HERBALIFE is visible on the green band. He looks directly at the camera.

The man in the grey pullover holds the white tub with the green label. He shifts his gaze from the camera down to the container. He holds the tub with both hands in front of his chest. The white square bowl and egg carton remain on the counter below.

The man holds the white tub with the green label in his right hand and a white plastic scoop in his left hand. He looks at the camera briefly before glancing down at the scoop. The white square bowl and egg carton remain on the counter surface below his hands.

The man in the grey pullover shifts his gaze from the white scoop in his right hand to the camera. He holds the white tub with the green label in his left hand. His mouth opens while gesturing slightly with the scoop held over the white counter.

The man in the grey pullover shifts his gaze down to the white tub held in his left hand. He inserts the white scoop held in his right hand into the container opening to scoop the contents. The white square bowl remains on the counter surface below.

The man in the grey pullover lifts the white scoop from inside the white tub with the green label, revealing it is filled with brown powder. He holds the loaded scoop just above the container opening while looking down at it. The white square bowl remains stationary on the counter surface below his hands.

The man moves the white scoop filled with brown powder away from the white tub held in his left hand. He positions the loaded scoop directly over the white square bowl on the counter, tilting it downwards to pour the powder into the container below.

The man tilts the white scoop to pour the brown powder into the white square bowl containing cracked eggs. He then submerges the scoop into the bowl and stirs the mixture while holding the large white tub in his right hand.

The man holds the white tub with the green label in his right hand. He inserts the white scoop back into the container with his left hand, digging into the brown powder. The white square bowl containing the mixture remains on the counter surface below.

The man in the grey pullover lifts the white scoop filled with brown powder from the large white tub with the green label. He positions the scoop over the white square bowl containing the egg mixture. He tilts the scoop to deposit the brown powder into the bowl.

The man tilts the white scoop to pour brown powder into the white square bowl containing cracked eggs. He holds the large white tub with the green label in his left hand. The powder falls onto the mixture, adding to the mound already in the bowl. His right hand manipulates the scoop over the bowl.

The man stirs the mixture of brown powder and eggs in the white square bowl using the white scoop. He holds the large white container with the green label in his left hand. The ingredients begin to blend into a thick, brown consistency as he mixes.

The man in the grey pullover holds the white tub with the green label in his left hand. He uses his right hand to lift the white scoop filled with brown powder from the container. He then tilts the scoop over the white square bowl, depositing the powder onto the existing brown mixture inside.

The man stirs a thick, dark brown mixture in the white square bowl using a metal spoon. The large white tub rests on the counter to his right. He holds the bowl with his left hand while mixing the batter with his right hand, blending the ingredients thoroughly.

The camera zooms in for a close-up of the white square bowl as the man stirs the thick, dark brown mixture with a metal spoon. The batter appears glossy and smooth. He holds the bowl steady with one hand while mixing the contents thoroughly with the other.

A close-up view shows a hand holding the white square bowl while a metal spoon stirs the thick, dark brown batter inside. The mixture appears smooth and glossy as the spoon blends the ingredients thoroughly, coating the inner sides of the bowl with the dark, viscous substance.

A close-up shows a metal spoon lifting thick, dark brown batter from a white square bowl, highlighting its glossy, viscous texture. The hand holding the bowl tilts it slightly while the spoon continues to mix the smooth, chocolate-colored mixture, coating the interior sides of the container.

The man in the grey pullover stands in front of a stainless steel microwave. He opens the door and places the white square bowl containing the dark brown batter onto the glass turntable inside. He uses his hands to slide the bowl into the center of the appliance.

The man holds the white square bowl with both hands, presenting the contents to the camera. The dark brown mixture has solidified into a cooked brownie with a matte surface, distinct from the previous liquid batter. He displays the finished dish after the microwave step.

The man holds the white square bowl containing the solidified dark brown mixture closer to the camera. He tilts the dish slightly to display the matte, cooked surface of the brownie. A black wristband with white lettering is clearly visible on his left wrist as he supports the container.

The camera view shifts to a wide shot of the white table surface. The white tub with the green label stands on the left. A grey mug is partially visible on the right edge. The background reveals a living area with a sofa and window, while the brownie bowl is removed from the central view.

A person's arm clad in a grey long-sleeved shirt rests on the left edge of the white table. The white square bowl filled with the dark brown cooked mixture is placed on the table surface in the lower right foreground, near the person's hand.

A hand wearing a black wristband with white text enters the frame holding a silver spoon. The person, clad in a grey long-sleeved shirt, positions the spoon over the white square bowl containing the dark brown cooked mixture on the white table surface.

A hand wearing a black wristband holds a silver spoon, pressing it into the dark brown mixture within the white square bowl. The spoon lifts a portion of the soft, cooked substance, showing its cake-like consistency as the metal utensil scoops the dessert.

A hand lifts a silver spoon containing a scoop of the dark brown, cake-like substance from the white square bowl. The spoon raises the portion, displaying the moist, solid texture of the cooked dessert above the remaining mixture inside the container. The bowl is held steady by the other hand during this action.

A hand holds a silver spoon lifting a portion of dark brown, moist substance from a white square bowl. The spoon showcases the cooked texture before re-entering the bowl to stir the thick mixture, while the other hand stabilizes the container on the white surface.

The silver spoon continues to manipulate the dark brown, moist mixture inside the white square bowl. It lifts a portion to show the dense texture before stirring the contents again, while the other hand keeps the bowl steady on the white table surface.
